name: vlds
description: VLDS — a standalone epistemic decision gate distilled from the P4 framework. Before a load-bearing claim drives an action, route it through VERIFIABLE → VERIFIED → {PROCEED / VERIFY_FIRST / QUALIFY}: no unverified claim drives an action, no unverifiable claim is asserted as fact. Tracks each claim's provenance through a neural-net metaphor and classifies it by storage durability. Portable; no dependency on the Roboto instance.
